documentation_impact.rationale: Phase 4 dogfood feature-delivery report stage. The tech-writer authored memory/features/timestamp-naming-conventions/delivery-report.md as the canonical delivery report for the feature, lineage-anchored to commits 90f6110, d26d4e1, f2263fc, 1ca2afd, 7d7b62a, and 635e5bb. The report cites the spec, plan, ADR 0005, review verdict (pass-with-conditions), the dry-run manifest (renames=35, referenceUpdates=451, collisionWarnings=0), and the four declared deferrals (migration write, contentHash mix, runner-not-wired, post-2500 rollover). The feature index advances current_stage to report with handoff to supervisor / ship. The supervisor's notifier post-run step will stage the report to inbox/out/.

deferred_items.rationale: Supervisor stages the PR (no auto-push per Q3); the supervisor invocation runs after this commit and stops at the human_approval gate.
The supervisor's notifier post-run step stages the delivery-report.md to inbox/out/; that staging is part of the ship stage, not the report stage.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: Slice delegates the report stage to the named tech-writer persona per §4 and produces only descriptive reportage; no new contracts, packages, or specs were authored.
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: Slice keeps every emitted artifact dual-anchored, surfaces the four open deferrals, and preserves the auditable commit lineage that future readers can replay end-to-end.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: Slice satisfies the Phase 4 report-stage requirement (delivery-report.md authored under memory/features/<id>/) and prepares the supervisor for the human_approval ship gate per Q3.
